column3: "Visnaga reduces inflammation" refers to its ability to lessen swelling and discomfort due to irritated or infected body tissues.
"Visnaga lowers blood pressure" refers to its ability to decrease high blood pressure levels, contributing to a healthier cardiovascular system.
"Visnaga boosts immune system" refers to its ability to enhance the body's natural defense mechanisms, leading to a healthier and more resistant individual.
"Visnaga supports digestive system" refers to its ability to improve gastrointestinal functions and overall health by enhancing nutrient absorption and aiding in food breakdown within the body.
"Visnaga relieves skin problems" refers to its ability to ease common dermatological conditions, such as eczema and rashes, through its healing properties found in the plant.
"Visnaga improves heart health" refers to its effect on cardiovascular wellbeing, potentially reducing risks and promoting better circulation.
"Visnaga promotes healthy liver function" refers to its ability to assist in keeping the liver working efficiently and effectively, thus contributing positively to overall well-being.

"Visnaga regulates blood sugar levels" refers to its ability to help maintain stable glucose concentration within our bodies, which is beneficial for those dealing with diabetes or blood sugar imbalances.

"Visnaga reduces cholesterol levels" refers to its ability to lower the amount of bad cholesterol circulating through your body's bloodstream, thus potentially contributing to better heart health and reducing risks related to high cholesterol.
"Visnaga prevents cancer" refers to its ability to reduce the risk of developing certain types of cancer due to its anti-tumor properties.
